item.title: Version 1.8.0
item.description:
### Added - New character count segmented bar and/or badge indicating the size of the element - History limit setting now has a help tooltip explaining that higher limits mostly affect search performance, and shows the current history file size
### Changed - Themes: reworked/polished existing themes and added new ones - Escape now clears the search field first when search text is present, instead of closing Clipiary immediately - Pg Up/Down keys now scroll one page instead of only half a page - Preview popup now limited to 10k chars max
### Fixed - Theme builder partially showed wrong initial values for undefined/defaulted properties
